name: Braised Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
Mix ground beef, fully cooked ham, ground pork, eggs, salt, pepper, and the nutmeg. Shape into a loaf. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Prepare Chipotle Sauce and set aside. Mix bread crumbs and tortilla mix. Coat meat loaf with the bread crumb mixture. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet until hot. Cook meat loaf in oil over medium heat until brown on all sides. Pour Chipotle Sauce over meat loaf. Heat to boiling and reduce the heat. Cover and simmer until done; about 1 hour.
